name: tree-sitter-javaswing
description: Tree-sitter grammar for Java Swing source code

scripts.parse:check: base=$(mktemp /tmp/javaswing-parse.XXXXXX) && tmp="$base.java" && mv "$base" "$tmp" && printf '%s\n' 'import javax.swing.*;' 'class Smoke extends JFrame {' '  private final JButton saveButton = new JButton("Save");' '  Smoke() {' '    setLayout(new java.awt.BorderLayout());' '    saveButton.addActionListener(event -> setVisible(false));' '    add(saveButton, java.awt.BorderLayout.SOUTH);' '    javax.swing.SwingUtilities.invokeLater(() -> setVisible(true));' '  }' '}' > "$tmp" && tree-sitter parse --quiet "$tmp"; rc=$?; rm -f "$tmp"; exit $rc
scripts.query:check: base=$(mktemp /tmp/javaswing-query.XXXXXX) && tmp="$base.java" && mv "$base" "$tmp" && printf '%s\n' 'import javax.swing.*;' 'class Demo extends JPanel {' '  JButton button = new JButton("OK");' '  void initComponents() {' '    button.addActionListener(e -> setVisible(true));' '    setLayout(new java.awt.BorderLayout());' '    add(button, java.awt.BorderLayout.CENTER);' '  }' '}' > "$tmp" && tree-sitter query --quiet queries/highlights.scm "$tmp" && tree-sitter query --quiet queries/tags.scm "$tmp" && tree-sitter query --quiet queries/swing.scm "$tmp"; rc=$?; rm -f "$tmp"; exit $rc
